name: 折叠刀（★） | 渐变大理石
nameZh: 折叠刀（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
